title: stachys riparia
intro: Stachys riparia, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, soothing digestive problems like stomach ulcers and diarrhea, and even aiding in the treatment of skin conditions like eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Stachys riparia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
